title: Nutty Silky Algerian Lasagne
description: This brunch-friendly dish combines almond and hazelnut flours with a creamy sauce for a silky texture. Perfect as an egg-free-friendly option.
instructions: In a pot, combine ground almonds and hazelnuts with water. Bring to a boil over medium heat, stirring occasionally.
Reduce heat to low and let simmer for about 15 minutes until thickened. Remove from heat and cool slightly.
Stir in butter and salt. Mix well. Add Parmesan cheese and stir until the mixture is smooth and creamy. Set aside.
Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Lay out lasagne sheets on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Spread half of the creamy almond-hazelnut sauce evenly over each lasagne sheet. Place another layer of lasagne on top, spreading more sauce over the second layer.
Bake for 25 minutes until golden brown and bubbly. Let cool slightly before serving.
Serve hot with a side of fruit salad or as a starter to your brunch menu.
